name: Starship Flight 8

launchSite.name: Starbase
launchSite.fullName: SpaceX Starbase, Boca Chica

details: Eighth Starship flight (B15/S34). Third successful tower catch. Ship lost approximately 9.5 minutes after liftoff due to Raptor engine hardware failure causing propellant mixing. Debris seen over Caribbean.
failureSummary: Third successful tower catch of Booster 15. Ship 34 lost after hardware failure in center Raptor engine caused propellant mixing and ignition, losing multiple engines and attitude control.

name: Starship Flight 9

launchSite.name: Starbase

details: Ninth Starship flight and first Super Heavy booster reuse (B14-2/S35). Booster completed ascent and hot-staging but disintegrated during landing burn. Ship completed ascent burn but was lost during reentry after thermal damage. FAA opened mishap investigation.
failureSummary: First reflown Super Heavy booster (B14-2). Booster RUD during landing burn over Gulf of Mexico. Ship lost during reentry over Indian Ocean after thermal damage.

launchSite.name: Starbase
launchSite.fullName: SpaceX Starbase, Boca Chica

details: Tenth Starship flight (B16/S37). Deployed 8 Starlink mass simulators and performed in-space Raptor relight. Booster engine shutdown prevented landing burn success. Ship survived reentry despite combustion event in engine bay, but was damaged.
failureSummary: Booster splashdown in Gulf after engine issues prevented catch attempt. Ship survived reentry despite aft engine bay explosion but broke up on splashdown.
